programme.desc: Abishola is nervous about Dele's trip to Nigeria with his father; Bob creates a guidebook on Nigeria for Dele that he proudly calls "Sights and Bites."

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Andy tries to find a perfect birthday present for his girlfriend (Jackie Debatin).

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim turns baby-sitting into a sporting event by staging baby races where the fathers bet on their kids.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike wants to give Boyd a shotgun for his 10th birthday, but Ryan is against the idea; Kyle and Mandy continue their wedding plans.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike decides that everyone in the family should dress up like each other for the annual Halloween party, hoping to turn everyone against the holiday.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.sub-title: A New Place for One of Our People
programme.desc: Mike attempts to teach Eve a hard lesson about life, but Eve's reaction throws Mike for a loop; Kyle attempts bartering to get Mandy an amazing wedding gift.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy's volatile pre-wedding day behavior causes Ed to opt out of the festivities, leaving Mandy to find a new best man for Kyle.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi are caught off guard by unexpected expenses, they each decide to give up a luxury to pay for the expenses.

programme.title: Man With a Plan

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim tries to blackmail Dana when he learns she is having erotic dreams about him.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl urges Jim to meet an old girlfriend (Linda Hamilton) for lunch, but has second thoughts when she becomes convinced the woman has romantic intentions.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Cheryl and Dana's mother, Maggie, visits for the holidays, Jim and Cheryl compete with Ryan and Dana for her affection.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Jim and Cheryl preview a sex education video to be shown to children at Ruby's school, they discover that the boy in the video is Jim.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: As part of a "Tool Time" salute to the armed forces, Tim drives a tank and doesn't do it very well.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) becomes extremely nervous when Jill (Patricia Richardson) wants him to get a vasectomy.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Astronauts of the space shuttle Columbia visit the "Tool Time" set after using Tim's screwdriver in space.

programme.title: Home Improvement

programme.desc: When Eve is inspired by her father's patriotism and decides to join the Junior ROTC, Vanessa is concerned.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike is so impressed with Mandy's new boyfriend that he offers him a job; Kristin navigates her relationship with Ryan.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike discovers that Boyd is no longer using the Baxter name; Kristin, Mandy and Eve make a Valentine's Day music video.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: The Outdoor Man puts on a skit based on a Wild West Show starring Ed and Eve and directed by Mike; Mandy tries flirting with an oblivious Kyle.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric turns into a turkey when his math teacher dines with the Formans on Thanksgiving Day. Tom Poston and Betty White guest star.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Archaeological investigations into the origins of democracy in Greece 2,500 years ago; mass graves and ancient ruins where tyrants were murdered shine light on the birth of a revolutionary form of government.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Exploring the unique evolutionary journey of woodpeckers and the role they play in every ecosystem, except Antarctica and Australia.

programme.title: Shared Planet
programme.desc: From New York to Kolkata, dicovering the surprising and beneficial ways urban wildlife transforms cities into thriving, shared ecosystems.

programme.title: Driving While Black: Race, Space and Mobility in America
programme.desc: The automobile brings new freedoms as well as perils to Blacks on the road from the 1930s to the late 1960s.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comic Brian Conley and broadcaster Nick Owen hunt for antiques in Shropshire and Worcestershire; assisting Nick is auctioneer Philip Serrell, while jewelry and gem expert Kate Bliss helps Brian.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Mister Rogers Talks About the Environment
programme.desc: Marine botanist Sylvia Earle and Fred Rogers snorkel off the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Binky's family adopts a baby girl from China, Binky worries about how his life will change and if his new sister will like him.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin and Chris spot a hermit crab on the beach.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters find a stowaway in their picnic basket, a little furry dog.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Everett's Swim Lesson; Miss Emmaline's New Beginning
programme.desc: Everett faces his fear of water by taking a swimming lesson; Lyla doesn't want Miss Emmaline to move.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: Whole Lotta Lotta; Leaf It to Carl
programme.desc: Lotta is determined to show Skyler that she is more than just "headphone girl"; the new kid in school causes a hullabaloo on the playground.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Uses a Bathroom; The Neighborhood Concert
programme.desc: Daniel uses a different bathroom at the train station and Juan uses the bathroom at the Music Shop; O uses the bathroom at Jodi's house.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay use Miss Jean's field guide to identify their new butterfly friend; Phoebe gets courage to perform at the talent show.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Rudy is afraid of getting a shot at the doctor's office, so Nina and Abby play pretend to show what the visit will be like so he can feel less scared.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: The Kaya-tastic Banana-tastic Halo Halo Split!; Amazing Adventure
programme.desc: Kaya's cooking class; the Wombats go on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Wowsabout

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Following Christ often requires sacrifice. Discover how letting go of selfish desires and choosing obedience to God leads to spiritual growth, deeper faith and lasting rewards.

programme.title: Daniah Greenberg: TLV Bible Plus
programme.desc: A fascinating look at the Bible translation that highlights the Hebrew roots of the Christian faith.

programme.desc: Joyce Meyer joins Matt and Laurie Crouch as they discuss her book "The Power of Thank You."

programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host Mike Rowe from Colorado.

programme.desc: Archaeologist and pastor Gary Kent communicates the Gospel of Jesus Christ through fascinating stories of history and testimonies of people from different walks of life.

programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Michael A. Youssef

programme.title: Dr. Tony Evans

programme.desc: Ron Carpenter leads the Body of Christ to a new level and reaches out to the lost and hurting.

programme.title: Unspeakable Joy
programme.desc: Pastor Tyler Gaulden preaches the word of God and proclaims unspeakable joy through Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.
